2606.13602.title: EpiBench: Verifiable Evaluation of AI Agents on Epigenomics Analysis
2606.13602.paper_summary: We introduce EpiBench, a verifiable benchmark for short-horizon epigenomics analysis. EpiBench evaluates whether agents can make well-defined analysis decisions from realistic workflow states and return deterministically gradable answers. The benchmark includes 106 evaluations across CUT\&Tag/CUT\&RUN, ATAC-seq, ChIP-seq, and DNA methylation workflows. Across 5,088 valid trajectories from 16 model-harness pairs, no system passed a majority of attempts: GPT-5.5 / Pi led at 45.0\% (143/318 attempts; 95\% confidence interval (CI), 36.3--53.7), followed by GPT-5.5 / OpenAI Codex at 39.9\% (127/318 attempts; 95\% CI, 31.6--48.3). Claude Opus 4.8 Max / Pi and GPT-5.4 / Pi each passed 39.0\% (124/318 attempts; 95\% CI, 30.2--47.8 and 31.0--47.0, respectively). Performance varies across assay types, and many failed runs still contain parts of the correct answer. Agents often found the right files and computed useful intermediate results, but failed when the task required deeper, assay-specific scientific judgment.
2606.13602.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 EpiBench，一個可驗證的短期範疇表觀基因組分析基準。EpiBench 評估代理是否能夠從現實的工作流程狀態中做出明確的分析決策並返回可確定評分的答案。該基準包括 106 次評估，涵蓋 CUT&Tag/CUT&RUN、ATAC-seq、ChIP-seq 和 DNA 甲基化工作流程。在 16 對模型-飼養者中，從 5,088 條有效軌跡中，沒有系統通過大多數嘗試：GPT-5.5 / Pi 以 45.0%（143/318 次嘗試；95% 置信區間 (CI)，36.3--53.7）領先，其次是 GPT-5.5 / OpenAI Codex 的 39.9%（127/318 次嘗試；95% CI，31.6--48.3）。Claude Opus 4.8 Max / Pi 和 GPT-5.4 / Pi 各自通過 39.0%（124/318 次嘗試；95% CI，30.2--47.8 和 31.0--47.0，分別）。性能在不同的測定類型中有所變化，許多失敗的運行仍然包含正確答案的部分。代理通常能找到正確的文件並計算有用的中間結果，但在任務需要更深入的、特定於測定的科學判斷時則失敗。
2606.13602.author: Harihara Muralidharan et.al.
2606.13602.authors: Harihara Muralidharan, Reema Baskar, Soo Hee Lee, Tim Proctor, Kenny Workman
